step_by_step_reasoning: First, we identify the ingestion layer consisting of the first Kinesis Data Streams ('Collect') receiving real-time events. Next, the data is persisted to Amazon Neptune, with replica data synced to Elasticsearch (OpenSearch) for analytics and Amazon DynamoDB for history. To manage write-scaling, CloudWatch gathers metrics from Elasticsearch and Neptune, feeding them to the custom Sharder Service (modeled as EC2), which dynamically routes traffic back to Neptune. For security checks, a second Kinesis Data Streams receives incoming events from the collector, queries Neptune to perform graph evaluations, writes any detected violations to DynamoDB, and sends alerts to Slack/Email (ThirdParty).

graph.name: Cloud Health by VMware: Real-time Cloud Security Monitoring at Scale
graph.notes: Real-time security platform processing billions of events daily and monitoring over 50 million resources across multiple clouds using graph database exploration.

nodes.name: Kinesis Data Streams (Collect)
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Real-time ingestion of native cloud security event streams handling billions of events daily.

nodes.name: Amazon Neptune
nodes.notes: DATA_PEEK: Handles 50M+ highly interconnected cloud resources. Agnostic graph database supporting read scale-out and schema-less data representation.

nodes.name: Elasticsearch
nodes.notes: Used for reporting, analytical capabilities, search, and aggregations.

nodes.name: Amazon DynamoDB
nodes.notes: Used for historical resource configuration visualization and storing security violations.

nodes.name: Amazon CloudWatch
nodes.notes: Monitors CPU, memory, and performance metrics from Neptune and Elasticsearch.

nodes.name: Sharder Service
nodes.notes: Microservice that uses CloudWatch metrics to determine shard capacity and balance data loads.

nodes.name: Kinesis Data Streams (Rule Engine)
nodes.notes: Fronts the rule execution pipeline, running thousands of rules over Neptune graph database.

nodes.name: Slack & Email
nodes.notes: Real-time notifications sent to customers when security violations are detected.
